scenario: NetworkPolicy blocks all egress — pod running but unreachable DB/Redis
notes: Pod is Running but not Ready. No crash, no missing resources, no Helm drift. A NetworkPolicy applied by the security team (SEC-4821) sets egress: [] which blocks ALL outbound traffic including DNS (UDP/53), PostgreSQL (5432), Redis (6379). Fix: add egress rules to order-service-restrict-egress NetworkPolicy.
